title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 320.250 - Powers of political subdivisions not affected
text:
320.250.  Powers of political subdivisions not affected. — Sections 320.200 to 320.270 shall not deprive the authorities of any county, city, or other political subdivision of any power or jurisdiction over property or fire regulations.
(L. 1972 S.B. 487 § 11)
